stemHtml: An aircraft is part of a traffic flow on the same ATS route towards the same aerodrome. ATC will assign cruising levels that, as far as practicable…

options.a: Are suitable for the approach sequence at the destination.
options.b: Provide 1000 ft vertical separation within RVSM airspace.
options.c: Are separated by at least 500 ft depending on traffic.
options.d: Provide 1000 ft vertical separation below RVSM airspace.
